data.acceptance: Acceptance criteria: (1) After a successful Create-More operation, all form fields are cleared or returned to their default values (no stale values from the previous submission). (2) Form validation and touched/dirty flags are reset so a subsequent Create-More starts as a fresh form. (3) The Create-More action can be triggered repeatedly and each submission uses the reset form state. (4) Validate in a browser context by using Playwright or chrome-devtools MCP scripts to assert post-submit DOM state and repeat the flow without stale input persistence.
